shortDescription.text: Possible hardcoded secret or API key

fullDescription.text: A high-entropy string or a pattern matching a known secret format was found in source code. Hardcoded secrets are exposed to everyone with repository access.

help.text: Move the value to an environment variable or secrets manager. If this is a real credential that was committed, rotate it and consider the old value compromised. Use explicit placeholders such as `<OPENAI_API_KEY>` or `${OPENAI_API_KEY}` in examples.

message.text: Possible hardcoded secret or API key

properties.recommendation: Move the value to an environment variable or secrets manager. If this is a real credential that was committed, rotate it and consider the old value compromised. Use explicit placeholders such as `<OPENAI_API_KEY>` or `${OPENAI_API_KEY}` in examples.

decision.recommendation: Move the value to an environment variable or secrets manager. If this is a real credential that was committed, rotate it and consider the old value compromised. Use explicit placeholders such as `<OPENAI_API_KEY>` or `${OPENAI_API_KEY}` in examples.
